createPR.forkDetectionFailed: Could not detect fork info (will use defaults)

description.rateLimit: Automatically switched to {{profileName}} due to a rate limit
description.earlyFailure: Automatically switched to {{profileName}} after an early failure

agentConsole.noSession: No live console available yet. Start the task to see the agent's pane.
agentConsole.attachConfirmBody: You'll be able to type into the running agent's terminal. Everything you do is recorded in the audit log under your account. This cannot be undone for an in-flight task.
agentConsole.raceLostBody: Another viewer is already attached to this task's live console. Try again after they detach.
agentConsole.headerHint: Read-only mirror of the agent's terminal. Click Attach to take control.

delegation.enableLabel: Delegate coding to the project's autonomous agent
delegation.enableHelp: TFactory still plans the spec, then hands the issue to GitHub Copilot Coding Agent (GitHub projects) or GitLab Duo Workflow (GitLab projects) for implementation. Uses your Copilot/Duo seat — no extra Claude tokens spent on coding.
delegation.githubOnlyTooltip: Delegation requires a GitHub project. GitLab Duo Workflow support is planned for a later release.
delegation.githubOrGitlabTooltip: Delegation requires a GitHub or GitLab project. Azure DevOps has no equivalent autonomous coding agent.
delegation.projectDefaultLabel: Delegate coding to Copilot for new tasks by default
delegation.projectDefaultHelp: Every new task in this GitHub project starts with delegation enabled. The wizard's per-task toggle still overrides on a case-by-case basis.
delegation.badgeTooltipPending: TFactory handed this issue to GitHub Copilot Coding Agent. Watching for the resulting PR — refresh in a few minutes.
delegation.badgeTooltipInReview: Copilot opened a PR for this issue. Click to open the PR.
delegation.declinedNotice: Copilot may have declined this task — no matching PR opened within 24 hours. You can re-run with the local TFactory agent.
